Marine Department.title: Marine Department
Marine Department.description: Hong Kong Shipping Register, ship registration, seafarer licensing, port control, and marine incident reports.

HKLII.title: HKLII
HKLII.description: Search Hong Kong admiralty and maritime law case law including collision, salvage, ship arrest, and bill of lading decisions.

Hong Kong e-Legislation.title: Hong Kong e-Legislation
Hong Kong e-Legislation.description: Official Bills of Lading Ordinance (Cap 440), Merchant Shipping Ordinances, and maritime legislation with cross-references.

HKIAC.title: HKIAC
HKIAC.description: Hong Kong International Arbitration Centre rules, marine panel, model clauses, and procedural guidance for maritime arbitration.
